text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, with Bamboo Memory's debut race just
around the corner...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! Hey, Yaeno! Fancy seeing you here!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Yaeno Muteki is in the same year as me, and she
studies martial arts. She's really cool and
approaches her training with great discipline day
in and day out!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hello, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Are you also here to train?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yep! My debut race's coming up, so I've gotta put
the pedal to the metal!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I usually come here to train or practice my sword
swings in order to clear my mind. Is that what
you're doing?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In a way. I am also here in an attempt to quiet my
heart.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! Well, since we're both here for the same
reason, let's both give our 110 percent!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'd like that.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Hah! Hmph! Hah! 100 more to go!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hah! Hmph! Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Phew! I worked up a good sweat!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Your swings were so clean yet full of passion. I
can feel how eager you are for your debut in how
you wield the blade.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same about you! Watching you
made me want to work even harder at perfecting
my swings!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I've been thinking this for a while, but we're
pretty similar, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You said before that you're going to take on
races against strong opponents, right?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's correct. I desire to compete in races where
I can pit the full fury of the fiery blaze within me
against formidable opponents. That is what I seek
upon the turf.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Me too! My dream is to find the ultimate rivals to
face off against in the ultimate race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: See, doesn't that makes us pretty similar?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I suppose so. Both of us yearn to partake in
battles where we must contend with mighty
opponents.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah, exactly!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, I don't believe we seek the same things
from our battles against our foes.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hm... What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I am to triumph over my adversaries using the
heart, technique, and strength of a martial artist,
I must raise those qualities to even greater
heights than my opponents have.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And while challenging these adversaries, I hope
to grow and learn from them in the midst of
battle. But above all...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This is the path by which I hope to repay the debt
I owe my grandparents, who tamed my violent
and erratic nature by teaching me the Kongo
Yaegaki style.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Only by honing both my mind and body through
fighting such formidable foes will I be able to
repay the kindness my grandparents showed me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That is what awaits me at the end of my battles.
Or, to borrow your own words...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That is my dream.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And if I may be so bold as to reveal another of my
goals, I wish to one day score but a single point
against my grandfather in a match...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But I digress... Um, Bamboo? Is something the
matter?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's an amazing dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Your passion made my heart skip a beat! You're
so cool! I'm moved!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Your grandfather's your teacher and your rival! That's the awesomest thing ever!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've never thought of Grandp—I mean
Grandfather—as my rival before. It's certainly a
refreshing point of view, though.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In any case, you give me far too much credit. My
trifling dream is not worthy of such praise.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nuh-uh, it totally is! Your dream's the best,
Yaeno! I'm gonna do everything I can to cheer
you on! And you know what?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I promise to get so strong that, when we end up
racing each other one day, you'll consider me one
of your formidable opponents!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Then, I'll also work hard so I can become one of
the ultimate rivals you seek.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That way, we can both help each other grow.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you really mean it?! WOOOO! I'm so
excited! It's a promise, then! No take backs!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Of course not. It's a promise.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...And that's what happened! What she said really
shook me to my core, but in a really, really good
way!
choice_data_list:
Sounds like your list of potential rivals just got
longer.

Sounds like your list of potential rivals just got
longer.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It sure did!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm ready to give training 110 percent
today and set the track on fire!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's debut race is just around the
corner, and the flames of her fighting spirit are
leaping higher than ever!
